hero_section.alignment: text-left on desktop, center on mobile
hero_section.features: Ivory background, text on left, mala image on right. Subtle gold accent lines.

features: Trust message bar: 'We respect your privacy'
multi_step_form.styling: Card layout with solid white/ivory background, soft 1px gold borders, no heavy shadows. Use Shadcn customized components.

quote_section.layout: flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center max-w-4xl mx-auto

experts_flip_cards.styling: Light ivory theme, 1px gold/maroon border on hover, elegant 3D flip animation on hover or click (using framer-motion). Back of card contains expert details.

featured_and_recognised.video_cards: grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-6. Include play button modal, image thumbnail with gold play icon overlay.
featured_and_recognised.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee for scrolling media logos (Hindustan Times, Deccan Chronicle, Garavi Gujarat, ET, Sunrise Radio, Bombay Times, Republic Bharat, Swastik Production).

floating_whatsapp.styling: Green/Gold pulse animation. Soft drop shadow. Rounded-full icon button.

sticky_header.features: Light version (ivory bg). Frosted glass effect (backdrop-blur-md bg-[#F8F4EC]/80). Includes Logo and a primary CTA button.

hero_image.alt: Premium wooden Rudraksha mala beads on ivory silk

background_texture.alt: Luxury ivory texture with subtle gold and maroon

expert_guru.alt: Spiritual guru meditating in a bright serene ivory temple

video_thumbnail.alt: Spiritual expert talking, luxury wellness aesthetic

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Apply STRICTLY a Light Theme. DO NOT add any dark mode toggles or dark variants. The background must remain Ivory/skin tone (#F8F4EC) globally.
Use 'Cormorant Garamond' (Serif) for headings and 'Manrope' for body text. These are already added in the CSS, just apply font-serif for headings.
Install 'lucide-react' for icons (WhatsApp icon, Play button, etc).
Install 'framer-motion' for flip cards (Experts section), 7-step form step-transitions, and the floating WhatsApp pulse animation.
Install 'react-fast-marquee' for the 'Featured & Recognised' scrolling media logos section.
Build the 7-step form using Shadcn customized components. Provide a visual progress bar (1 to 7). Step 7 is a 'Namaste' success message. Add the text 'We respect your privacy' under the form.
Ensure the floating WhatsApp button uses a pulse animation with a soft shadow and stays in the bottom-right.
All interactive elements MUST include 'data-testid' attributes in kebab-case.
